title: citrus × tachibana subf. koozi
intro: Citrus × tachibana subf. koozi, also known as Sudachi or Japanese citron, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, specifically a citrus fruit variety native to Japan. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Sudachi include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and supporting the immune system. Sudachi is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
